ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student belongs to */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of a parent or guardian */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., Math 101) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher responsible for the class */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the class is offered */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the class is held */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "class_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the class */,
  "teaching_assistant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teaching assistant helping in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teaching_assistant_id FOREIGN KEY ("teaching_assistant_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher works in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the teacher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the teacher has been teaching */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Additional certifications the teacher has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class associated with the survey */,
  "wave" INTEGER /* Wave number of the survey (indicating iteration) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was conducted */,
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the questionnaire used in the survey */,
  "survey_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the survey */,
  "number_of_questions" INTEGER /* Number of questions in the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_questionnaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("questionnaire_id") REFERENCES questionnaires ("questionnaire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being responded to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student responding to the survey */,
  "math_feeling" TEXT /* Student's feeling about math (e.g., :) or :|) */,
  "good_at_math" TEXT /* Student's self-assessment of being good at math */,
  "math_easy_hard" TEXT /* Student's assessment of the difficulty level of math */,
  "math_stressed" TEXT /* Indicates if the student feels stressed about math */,
  "survey_stressed" TEXT /* Indicates if the student feels stressed overall during the survey */,
  "math_anxiety" TEXT /* Indicates if the student has math anxiety */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the response */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the response was submitted */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the response */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback from the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "math_sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class associated with the analysis */,
  "average_feeling" REAL /* Average feeling score about math based on responses */,
  "average_anxiety" REAL /* Average anxiety score about math based on responses */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses analyzed */,
  "average_confidence_level" REAL /* Average confidence level in math */,
  "average_math_difficulty" REAL /* Average perceived difficulty of math */,
  "average_stress_level" REAL /* Average stress level during math tasks */,
  "average_math_stress" REAL /* Average stress level specifically related to math */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_math_sentiment_analysis_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment report */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the sentiment analysis findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* More detailed summary of the report findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_reports_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher being evaluated */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class associated with the evaluation */,
  "average_feedback_score" REAL /* Average feedback score from students for the teacher */,
  "total_surveys" INTEGER /* Total number of surveys conducted for the teacher */,
  "average_student_satisfaction" REAL /* Average satisfaction of students with the teacher */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "improvement_over_time" TEXT /* Improvement in student feedback over time */,
  "additional_feedback" TEXT /* Additional feedback or comments about the teacher's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_performance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_performance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the demographic data */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "parental_education" TEXT /* Highest level of education of the student's parents */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the student's family */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Any special educational needs */,
  "attendance_record" TEXT /* Attendance record of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response associated with the comment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student leaving the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Open-ended feedback comment from the student */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "comment_category" TEXT /* Category of the comment (e.g., content, teaching style) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the comment */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_comments_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_levels" (
  "stress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress level record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the stress level */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the stress */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Self-reported stress level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stress level was recorded */,
  "stress_source" TEXT /* Source of stress (e.g., exams, homework) */,
  "stress_coping_methods" TEXT /* Methods the student uses to cope with stress */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stress level */,
  "stress_monitoring_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to measure stress levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_levels_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_levels_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questionnaires" (
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each questionnaire */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the questionnaire */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the questionnaire */,
  "number_of_questions" INTEGER /* Number of questions in the questionnaire */,
  "questionnaire_type" TEXT /* Type of questionnaire (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended) */,
  "questionnaire_format" TEXT /* Format of the questionnaire (e.g., online, paper) */,
  "questionnaire_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration to complete the questionnaire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("questionnaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view report, submit survey) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Teacher, Student) */,
  "user_action_details" TEXT /* More detailed information about the action taken */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Teacher, Student) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_hierarchy" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the role */,
  "role_permissions_details" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
